calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-28-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Plaintiff, Alberto Myhrer is present and sworn.

Defendant, Alouis Auto Radiator Inc represented by Todd Goulding (Service Writer/Manager) and Norbert Bajurn are present and sworn.

Judge Curtis Karnow hears the Trial De Novo.

No exhibits are retained.

Matter is taken undersubmission.
